title: Delphinium linearilobum
intro: Delphinium linearilobum is a plant species within the genus Delphinium, belonging to the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the delphinium or larkspur. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and its anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Delphinium linearilobum include delphinine, a diterpenoid alkaloid, and other alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and relieve pain.
